finding: 3-node repro: Comp>Background panels>Panel right 1 (factoryID=12 shape, 15-kp bezier Position.X in local neg-time, timing in=2.870s out=6.773s offset=3.337s). f00-f10 match FCP (99dB); f12-f17 the panel fills the RIGHT HALF (cols5-7=254 white) in FCP but the ENGINE renders it BLACK/absent (all cols 0). Bug = panel visibility/position: engine drops the offset-anchored panel exactly when FCP shows it. Likely animationEndSec or the offset-curveTime re-anchor evaluating the panel off-screen/invisible in the f12-f17 window.
